Right side: log8(x^k) = k log8(x) = k * log2(x)/log2(8) = k * log2(x)/3. So equation: 9 log2(x) = (k/3) log2(x). Cancel log2(x) (nonzero for x>0). So 9 = k/3 => k = 27. So the correct answer is 27.
